CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '2') , EndDate + (6/24) , IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '110') , EndDate + (6/24) , IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '114') , EndDate + (6/24) , IF( ISPICKVAL( Status , '115') , EndDate + (6/24) , IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(Status, '51'), ISPICKVAL(MotifARevoir__c, '10')) ,EndDate + (6/24) , null)))))
CustomField.label: DateFinReelleWOVillogia
